title: Got Gocio E Mountain Bike & rode it 18 mi in 130 at park before battery died

transcript.text: Hello, here's my vlog for 22nd, I think. So this morning, oh man, I don't even know what time it is. 23rd Sunday, 11.34. Yeah, I woke up like tired, like worn out.
Like, yeah, like my whole body, you know, tired. Yesterday, I bought an electric mountain bike, my first electric mountain bike, and I went on my very first electric mountain bike ride.

I got the Gosio electric mountain bike, I guess they're for sale for $450. But man, I got mine for $350, but like it has 500 freaking watts, and it has two batteries, and it's like, it's a full suspension mountain bike.

The rear suspension is like a rubber cushion, and the front suspension is a small travel shock. Yeah, that bottoms out all the time. But, yeah, I got that, and it folds, so I can put it in my trunk of my car.
So, yeah, I got that, and pedals, and it came charged, so I took it down to the bike path, bike park. And, yeah, I rode it for, you have it five power levels, I put it on power level five.
And, yeah, I just did all the park on it, and over and over again, big loops, and it was like so freaking amazing. It was like riding a motorbike when it's fresh.
When I first started, it's like going up the hill so freaking fast. Yeah, and then you can go down. I was launching off of the wooden, yeah, and you can do jumps on it.
